name: Stuffed Cottage Cheese Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
12 Servings
Prepare 12 mini-sandwiches using French bread and cottage cheese. Separate the eggs, beating the yolks with sugar until thick. Add vanilla, grated nutmeg, and milk to the yolk mixture. Beat the egg whites to soft peaks and gently fold them into the yolk mixture. Dip each sandwich into the batter and brown on both sides in 4 to 6 tablespoons of unsalted butter.
